objective: 建立 AI-company orchestration core，讓任務建立後可自動完成 task classification、pipeline attach、meeting trigger、agent assignment、event logging 與 decision trace，並以單頁簡化 Web GUI 呈現 current status、active agents、result trustworthiness 與可展開細節。只有當 KPI spec、test matrix、SQLite-backed monitor、simple GUI 與 goal check 全部就位且驗證通過時，才視為完成。
notes: Goal text alone is not enough; the goal package must include KPI spec, test matrix, and goal check assets.
The default GUI must stay simple: current status, active agents, and result trustworthiness only.
Meeting, pipeline, event log, and decision cockpit must be modeled as automatic orchestration capabilities, not manual user steps.
